text:
Once upon a time, in a forest thick with silence, there was a small clear brook. The creatures who lived there loved its clear waters. Every day, birds sang while drinking, squirrels chattered from the trees, and bugs buzzed near the water.

One particular morning, a young squirrel named Benny woke up bright and eager. Benny was fascinated by stories his grandmother told him about the distant human world. Determined to know more, he decided to explore the forest. He scampered up a young oak tree at its edge, peeking out over the water.

From up there, Benny saw something unusual—human children laughing and playing. Curious, he climbed down low enough to hop to the other side. They looked delightful, chasing each other around the peaceful stream. Benny couldn't resist joining in their fun.
